description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Schedule a one-time payment for the upcoming rent bill using the available payment method with the lowest convenience fee, for the full amount due, dated exactly 3 days before the bill’s due date and including a brief rent memo.

target_names: Scheduled payment for upcoming rent bill

tasks.name: Schedule a one-time payment for the upcoming rent bill using the available payment method with the lowest convenience fee, for the full amount due, dated exactly 3 days before the bill’s due date and including a brief rent memo.

tasks.instruction: Create a recurring autopay for your rent and related fees that pays the full statement balance 5 days before each monthly due date using a saved bank account with no convenience fee, with reminders sent 2 days before each withdrawal and no end date.

target_names: Rent autopay - full balance 5 days before due date

tasks.instruction: Submit a non-emergency maintenance request for a kitchen plumbing issue with a detailed description, marked as low priority, choosing a weekday-morning 2-hour appointment window within the next 7 days and allowing staff to enter if you’re not home.

target_names: Non-urgent maintenance request for leaky kitchen faucet

expected_values.title: Leaky kitchen faucet dripping constantly.
expected_values.description: The kitchen sink faucet has a steady drip that won’t stop even when fully turned off; it has been leaking for 3 days.

tasks.instruction: From the parking options, filter for covered parking spaces under $80 per month and reserve the single cheapest available spot for your current unit starting on the first day of next month.
tasks.name: From the parking options, filter for covered parking spaces under $80 per month and reserve the single cheapest available spot for your current unit starting on the first day of next month.

tasks.instruction: In your transaction history for the last 6 months, identify the late fee with the highest dollar amount and flag only that transaction for manager review.

target_names: Late fee assessed for January 2026 rent

tasks.instruction: Update your notification settings so that payment alerts are sent by email only, maintenance updates by SMS/text only, and all marketing or promotional messages are disabled.

tasks.instruction: Add a new authorized occupant to your current lease starting on the first day of next month, setting their relationship to you as a roommate and entering their full name and phone number, with building access enabled.

tasks.instruction: Review your lease renewal offers, filter to 12-month terms with monthly rent below $1,600, and accept the single offer with the lowest monthly rent from that list.

tasks.instruction: Use the amenities reservation system to book a 1-hour gym session for tomorrow at the earliest available start time that is at or after 6:00 PM for one attendee.
